Home / Service Areas / The Bronx

Masonry contractor in The Bronx, NY

Trusted local professionals serving The Bronx and surrounding communities

Serving The Bronx, NY

Brick Tech Contracting Corp is proud to offer professional masonry services to the residents and businesses of The Bronx. We provide a range of brickwork solutions, tailored to the unique architectural landscape of this borough. From historic buildings to modern developments, we are equipped to handle projects of any scale. Our services include brick repair, repointing, chimney services, and new construction projects throughout The Bronx. Brick Tech Contracting Corp is committed to delivering quality craftsmanship, reliable service, and exceptional customer satisfaction. We use only the highest quality materials and employ proven techniques to ensure lasting results. We strive to enhance the beauty and durability of buildings throughout The Bronx. Contact us today to learn more about our services and how we can help you with your masonry needs.

The Bronx is a borough known for its rich history, vibrant culture, and iconic landmarks. Brick Tech Contracting Corp is proud to serve the masonry needs of this diverse community.

Masonry contractor Services in The Bronx

Brick Repair & Restoration

Preserving New York's architectural heritage through expert brick repair and restoration.

Learn more →

Stone Masonry

Crafting durable and beautiful stone structures that enhance your property's value.

Learn more →

Concrete Block (CMU)

Providing durable and cost-effective concrete block solutions for various construction needs.

Learn more →

Chimney Repair & Rebuild

Ensuring safe and efficient chimney operation through expert repair and rebuild services.

Learn more →

Foundation Repair

Stabilizing and strengthening your building's foundation with expert repair solutions.

Learn more →

Parapet Wall Services

Expert repair, restoration, and construction of parapet walls in New York City.

Learn more →
